title: BizElevate Local Secrets
description: Schema for secrets.local.json — NOT committed. Create this file locally and fill in real values.

VAPI_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Server URL secret configured in VAPI assistant settings (x-vapi-secret header)

N8N_API_KEY.description: n8n Cloud API key (Settings → API → Create API Key)

SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase project URL — Settings → API → Project URL (e.g. https://xxxx.supabase.co)

SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.description: Supabase anon/public key — Settings → API → anon public (used in the dashboard app, safe for browser)

SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY.description: Supabase service role key — Settings → API → service_role (used by n8n server-side writes, bypasses RLS — never expose in browser)

SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Supabase publishable key — used in dashboard app as alternative to anon key

TEST_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD.description: Shared password for Google test accounts (shijubeta@gmail.com, shijugamma@gmail.com) — used for Step 7/8 auth flow testing only
